specFidelityNotes: Diff a6a7827c vs d9ab6d4d on feature/issue-491-business-account-holder-oauth. Implements ADR-032 account-holder callback GET /v1/auth/tiktok/business/account-holder/callback: public (no JWT), auth_code+state validation, HMAC state verification, Marketing API token exchange via business-api.tiktok.com v1.3 oauth2/access_token/, encrypted persistence with capability business_account_holder isolated from Shop Partner and Advertiser rows. Controlled errors mirror Shop callback (400 missing params, 401 bad state, 502 exchange failure, 503 missing config). Account-holder-only file set; no business_advertiser_* paths.

convention_notes.note: persist_account_holder_tokens returns silently when token payload lacks access_token, refresh_token, or merchant subject id; callback still returns 200. Documented assumption; acceptable for slice but worth monitoring in live token-shape validation.
